summary_en: 2,675,413 shares (24.06% of issued stock) to be cancelled effective 2026-07-10. Includes 2,644,288 treasury shares held as of 2026-03-31 and 31,125 shares held by stock grant trust to be acquired by 2026-07-10. Post-cancellation issued shares: 8,445,125. Conditional on shareholder approval of stock split (effective 2026-07-13) and trust share acquisition.
title_en: Notice of Cancellation of Treasury Shares
translation_en_brief: WAVELOCK HOLDINGS filed notice on 2026-05-20 of a board resolution to cancel 2,675,413 treasury shares, representing 24.06% of issued stock prior to cancellation. The cancellation is scheduled for 2026-07-10 and will reduce issued shares from approximately 11.12 million to 8.45 million. The cancelled shares comprise 2,644,288 treasury shares held directly as of 2026-03-31 plus 31,125 shares held by the company's stock grant trust (BBT) to be acquired at no cost by 2026-07-10. The cancellation is conditional on shareholder approval at the June 18, 2026 annual meeting of a separate stock split (effective 2026-07-13) and completion of the trust share acquisition by July 10, 2026.
